name: Shaanxi Zhongtian Rocket Technology Co., Ltd
summary: Shaanxi Zhongtian Rocket Technology Co., Ltd researches and designs solid rockets and rocket engines in China. It offers automated launchers, 120 simulation training bombs, remote control ground flame spread systems, long March-2F simulation model, dongfeng-1 missile model, long March 3 carrier rocket model, electrical alloys, long-range single soldier forest fire-fighting systems, hygroscopic flame strips, thunder rockets, TWR01 weather radar systems, airborne flame spread systems, remote remote ground spreading systems, skyhawk IV weather rocket systems, rain-proof and anti-smashing rocket special storage cabinets, sub-mother rain-enhanced anti-smash rockets, and rain-enhanced and increasing anti-smash rockets. The company is based in Xian, China.
